nasb.text: You shall thus give the Levites to Aaron and to his sons; they are wholly given to him from among the sons of Israel.

esv.text: And you shall give the Levites to Aaron and his sons; they are wholly given to him from among the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 你要把利未人派給亞倫和他的兒子，因為他們是從以色列人中選出來完全給他的。

ccb.text: 你要把利未人交给亚伦父子们，因为他们是从以色列人中选出来协助亚伦的。
